error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Kiosker device.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your API token.
error.invalid_ip_auth: IP authentication failed. Check your IP whitelist.
error.tls_error: TLS verification failed. Check your SSL settings.

data_description.api_token: The API token for the Kiosker App. This can be generated in the app API settings.
data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of the device running the Kiosker App
data_description.ssl: Connect to the Kiosker App using HTTPS. The Kiosker API has to be configured for SSL.
data_description.verify_ssl: Verify SSL certificate. Enable for valid certificates only.

user.description: Enable the API in Kiosker settings to pair with Home Assistant.
user.title: Pair Kiosker App

zeroconf.description: Do you want to configure {name} at {host}?

data_description.api_token: The API token for the Kiosker App. This can be generated in the app API settings.
data_description.verify_ssl: Verify SSL certificate. Enable for valid certificates only.

zeroconf_confirm.description:
You are about to pair `{name}` at `{host}` with Home Assistant.

Please provide the API token to complete setup.
zeroconf_confirm.title: Discovered Kiosker App
